title: Ryan Clayton (actor)
extract: Ryan Clayton (born 1992 or 1993) is an English actor. Born and raised in Manchester, he is known for his roles as  Josh Tucker in Coronation Street between 2018 and 2020 and Mike Rutherford in Waterloo Road between 2023 and 2026. For his role in Coronation Street, he was longlisted for "Best Bad Boy" at the 2018 Inside Soap Awards. He has also had guest appearances in Exile and Young Dracula. In January 2026, it was announced that he had joined the cast of Hollyoaks as Jenson Cole.
